info.title: AB Brain - Knowledge Base API
info.description:
AB Brain — Avi Bar's unified personal knowledge base, training intelligence, and AI coaching platform.

## Daily Fitness Workflow (Evaluate → Plan → Execute → Review → Repeat)

### 1. EVALUATE — Review past performance
- `GET /daily-plans/by-date/{yesterday}` — see yesterday's plan vs actual + ring progress
- `GET /training/day/{date}` — full context (workouts, nutrition, body, injuries, active plan, daily plan)
- `GET /recovery/score` — today's recovery readiness

### 2. PLAN — Set daily plans
- `POST /daily-plans` — create today's plan (workout type, effort target, nutrition targets, sleep target)
- `POST /daily-plans/week` — create 7 daily plans at once (start_date + array of 7 day objects)
- Plans are always daily granularity. A weekly plan = 7 daily plans. Plans can be amended mid-week.
- Check `GET /training/injuries/active/summary` before planning to account for injuries

### 3. EXECUTE — User logs activity
- User logs workouts via `POST /workouts`, meals via `POST /meals`, context via `POST /nutrition/daily-context`
- Rings fill automatically: Train (effort vs target), Fuel (protein + calories + hydration), Recover (sleep + quality + recovery rating)

### 4. REVIEW — End-of-day coaching review
- `GET /daily-plans/by-date/{date}` — plan vs actual comparison + ring progress for the day
- `POST /training/coaching` — save the coaching review with key_decisions, adjustments, injury_notes, next_steps
- Link coaching session to daily plan via daily_plan_id field

### 5. AMEND — Adjust plans based on progress
- `PUT /daily-plans/{id}` — amend today's or future plans
- `PUT /training/plans/{id}` — update the parent training plan if needed

### Rings (Achievement-Based Motivation)
- **Train** (green): Weighted effort score — actual effort / target effort. Rest days auto-close.
- **Fuel** (amber): Nutrition checklist — protein target + calories in range + hydration target (0-3).
- **Recover** (indigo): Recovery checklist — sleep hours + sleep quality + recovery/energy rating (0-3).
- Targets cascade: daily plan → gamification settings defaults.
- `GET /gamification` — today's ring progress, streaks, badges, nudges with specific guidance.

### For Training Plan Creation
1. Review recent workouts: `GET /workouts?limit=20`
2. Review body trends: `GET /body-metrics?limit=10`
3. Check active injuries: `GET /training/injuries?status=active`
4. Create block/mesocycle plan: `POST /training/plans` — include goal, rationale, weekly_structure
5. Generate daily plans from it: `POST /daily-plans/week` with training_plan_id

### For General Queries
- `GET /search?q=term` — full-text search across ALL data types
- `POST /search/ai` — AI-optimized search returning typed results
- `GET /dashboard` — overview stats for all tables

### Data Types Available
Knowledge, Facts, Tasks, Projects, Transcripts, Conversations, Workouts, Meals, Body Metrics, Daily Nutrition Context, Training Plans, Daily Plans, Coaching Sessions, Injuries, Gamification (Rings, Streaks, Badges)

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Workouts on or after this date

post.summary: Log a new Spartan workout with structured fields for type, workout details, metrics, performance, body feedback, and adjustments
post.description: Post a structured workout log. ChatGPT should use this after a workout recap conversation. Include workout_type, focus, warmup, main_sets, carries, metrics (time, distance, elevation), effort rating 1-10, performance notes (slowdown, failure point), body feedback (grip, legs, cardio, shoulder), and adjustment for next time. Tags should be lowercase without # prefix. Also include heart_rate_avg, heart_rate_max, pace_avg, cadence_avg, active_calories, total_calories, splits, and exercises when available.

title.description: Auto-generated if empty: 'Spartan Workout – DATE – TYPE'

elevation.description: Base elevation if relevant, e.g. 1,320 ft

focus.description: Goal of the workout, e.g. hill durability, grip endurance

slowdown_notes.description: Where did I slow down or break form

failure_first.description: What failed first: legs / grip / cardio / shoulders

grip_feedback.description: Grip status: solid / pumped / gave out

cardio_feedback.description: Cardio status: steady / gasping / recovered fast

body_notes.description: Additional body feedback or recovery notes

adjustment.description: What to change next time: weight, pace, structure

splits.description: Split times per mile or lap

exercises.description: Structured exercise list with sets, reps, weight

title.description: Auto-generated if empty: 'Spartan Workout – DATE – TYPE'

elevation.description: Base elevation if relevant, e.g. 1,320 ft

focus.description: Goal of the workout, e.g. hill durability, grip endurance

slowdown_notes.description: Where did I slow down or break form

failure_first.description: What failed first: legs / grip / cardio / shoulders

grip_feedback.description: Grip status: solid / pumped / gave out

cardio_feedback.description: Cardio status: steady / gasping / recovered fast

body_notes.description: Additional body feedback or recovery notes

adjustment.description: What to change next time: weight, pace, structure

splits.description: Split times per mile or lap

exercises.description: Structured exercise list with sets, reps, weight

get.summary: List or search body composition measurements

parameters.name: latest
parameters.description: Return only the most recent entry

200.description: Body metrics list or single latest entry

post.summary: Create a body composition measurement entry

get.summary: Get daily nutrition context (energy, sleep, hydration, cravings, etc.)

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Get context for a specific date

post.summary: Create daily nutrition context for a date

409.description: Context already exists for this date

get.summary: List or search training plans (periodized blocks, mesocycles, rehab plans)

post.summary: Create a new training plan with goals, phases, weekly structure, and rationale

get.summary: List AI coaching session summaries (injury notes, adjustments, rationale)

post.summary: Save a coaching session summary after reviewing training data with AI

get.summary: List injuries/contentions with body area, severity, and status filters

parameters.name: body_area
parameters.description: Filter by body area (e.g. shoulder, knee, lower_back)

post.summary: Log an injury or contention with symptoms, treatment, and movement modifications

put.summary: Update an injury (e.g. change status to resolved, add treatment notes)

get.summary: Cross-reference ALL fitness data for a specific date: workouts, meals, nutrition context, body metrics, coaching sessions, active injuries, and current training plan

200.description: Complete training day view with all cross-referenced data

get.summary: Get activity rings, streaks, badges, weekly progress, and smart suggestions
get.description: Returns today's achievement-based ring progress (Train/Fuel/Recover), streaks, badges, weekly summary, and nudges with specific guidance. Train ring = weighted effort score (actual/target). Fuel ring = protein + calories + hydration checklist. Recover ring = sleep hours + sleep quality + recovery rating checklist. Also includes today_plan summary if a daily plan exists.

rings.description: Today's ring progress. Train = weighted effort (actual/target, 0-100%). Fuel = protein hit + calories hit + hydration hit (0-3 checklist). Recover = sleep hours + sleep quality + recovery rating (0-3 checklist). Each ring includes detailed hit/miss for each sub-target.

fuel.description: Nutrition targets checklist: protein_hit, calories_hit, hydration_hit. current = count of targets hit (0-3), goal = 3.

streaks.description: Consecutive days for each category. Fuel = 2+ nutrition targets hit. Recover = 2+ recovery targets hit. Perfect = all 3 rings closed.

suggestions.description: Smart goal adjustment suggestions based on trailing 7-day averages. direction=up means user is crushing it and should raise goal, direction=down means goal may be too ambitious.

get.summary: List daily plans with date range filters

post.summary: Create a single daily plan with workout, nutrition, and recovery targets
post.description: Creates one daily plan. plan_date is required and must be unique. Use POST /daily-plans/week to create 7 plans at once. Targets set here override gamification_settings defaults for ring calculations.

409.description: A plan already exists for this date. Use PUT to amend it.

post.summary: Create 7 daily plans at once for a week
post.description: Accepts start_date and an array of 1-7 daily plan objects. Each is assigned consecutive dates starting from start_date. If a plan already exists for a date, it is updated (upsert). Link to a training_plan_id to associate with a mesocycle/block.

start_date.description: First day of the week (usually Monday)

training_plan_id.description: Optional link to parent training plan

days.description: Array of 1-7 daily plan objects. Each gets consecutive dates starting from start_date.

get.summary: Get daily plan + actual data + plan-vs-actual comparison + ring progress for a date
get.description: The key endpoint for the daily fitness workflow. Returns the plan, all actual logged data (workouts, meals, nutrition context, body metrics), a structured comparison, and ring progress calculations.

comparison.description: Actual vs target for effort, calories, protein, hydration, sleep

ring_progress.description: Train/Fuel/Recover ring percentages and hit/miss details

put.description: Use this to adjust today's or future plans based on how things are going. Can change targets, status, notes, etc.

get.summary: Get recovery score for a specific date

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date to get recovery score for (defaults to today)

weekly_structure.description: Array of day-by-day plan: [{day: 'Monday', type: 'strength', focus: 'upper body', notes: '...'}]

rationale.description: WHY this plan was chosen — training philosophy, injury avoidance, periodization reasoning

constraints.description: Limitations: injuries, schedule, equipment, recovery needs

key_decisions.description: Key decisions made during the session

adjustments.description: Training adjustments: [{area: 'volume', change: 'reduce upper body sets by 20%', reason: 'shoulder impingement'}]

data_reviewed.description: What data was reviewed: {workouts_from: '2026-03-01', workouts_to: '2026-03-18', body_metrics: true}

workout_type.description: e.g. strength, run, hybrid, hill, recovery, ruck

workout_focus.description: e.g. upper push, legs, zone 2, full body

target_effort.description: Target effort rating. Train ring = actual effort / target effort.

target_calories.description: Target daily calories. Fuel ring checks actual within ±10%.

target_protein_g.description: Target daily protein in grams. Fuel ring checks actual >= target.

target_hydration_liters.description: Target daily water intake in liters. Fuel ring checks actual >= target.

target_sleep_hours.description: Target sleep hours. Recover ring checks actual >= target.

coaching_notes.description: Context from coaching session — why this plan was chosen

rationale.description: Training rationale for this day's plan

plan_date.description: Date for the plan (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be unique.

training_plan_id.description: Optional link to parent training plan (mesocycle/block)

workout_type.description: e.g. strength, run, hybrid, hill, recovery, ruck

workout_focus.description: e.g. upper push, legs, zone 2, full body

target_sleep_hours.description: Target sleep hours for the night before

coaching_notes.description: Context from coaching — why this plan
